name: Mithila Palkar
introduction:
Mithila Palkar is a popular Indian actress known for her charming screen presence, natural acting style, and signature curly hair. She rose to fame through digital platforms and quickly became one of the most recognizable faces of India’s web-series era. With her relatable performances and youthful energy, Mithila has successfully built a strong fan base among younger audiences.

Born on 11 January 1993 in Mumbai, Maharashtra, Mithila began her journey in the entertainment industry with short films and online content before gaining mainstream recognition. Her breakthrough came with the widely loved web series Little Things, where she played the role of Kavya, a character that resonated with millions of viewers.

Apart from web series, Mithila has also appeared in several films including Karwaan and Tribhanga, showcasing her versatility as an actress. Over the years, she has worked across Hindi and Marathi cinema, earning praise for her authentic performances and relatable characters.

Today, Mithila Palkar continues to grow as an actress while balancing films, digital content, and brand collaborations. Her journey from viral internet videos to mainstream cinema reflects her talent, dedication, and ability to connect with modern audiences.
achievements:
Mithila Palkar has earned recognition for her performances in web series, films, and digital content. Her natural acting style and strong connection with younger audiences have helped her become one of the most notable faces in India’s digital entertainment space.

Major Achievements

  • Breakthrough with Digital Content (2016)
    Mithila gained nationwide popularity after her viral “Cup Song” video, which quickly spread across social media and introduced her to a wider audience.

  • Success of “Little Things”
    Her role as Kavya Kulkarni in the popular web series Little Things became a major milestone in her career. The series received praise for its relatable storytelling and became one of Netflix India's well-known relationship dramas.

  • Bollywood Film Debut
    Mithila made her Hindi film debut with Karwaan, where she worked alongside respected actors like Irrfan Khan and Dulquer Salmaan.

  • Recognition in Regional Cinema
    She also gained appreciation for her work in Marathi cinema with the film Muramba, which performed well among audiences.

  • Growing Digital Influence
    Mithila has built a strong presence on social media platforms and has collaborated with several well-known lifestyle and fashion brands, further expanding her influence beyond films and web series.

Industry Impact

Over the years, Mithila Palkar has successfully transitioned from internet fame to mainstream entertainment, becoming a prominent figure in India’s evolving OTT and digital content industry. Her journey from viral videos to recognized acting projects reflects her versatility and dedication to her craft.
controversies:
Mithila Palkar has largely maintained a clean public image throughout her career and has not been involved in any major controversies in the entertainment industry. Known for her calm personality and professional approach, she has mostly stayed away from public disputes or scandals.

Like many public figures, Mithila occasionally receives online criticism or mixed reactions related to her roles, social media posts, or public appearances. However, these situations have generally been minor and short-lived, and they have not significantly affected her career.

Instead of being associated with controversies, Mithila is often appreciated for her positive attitude, relatable personality, and professional conduct. She continues to focus on her acting projects, brand collaborations, and creative work in films and web series.

Overall, Mithila Palkar’s career has been defined more by her performances and growing popularity in digital entertainment rather than by controversies.

movies.name: Majha Honeymoon
movies.description:
Majha Honeymoon is a Marathi short film that marked the acting debut of Mithila Palkar. The film revolves around humorous and relatable moments connected to newly married life and relationships. Although it was a small independent project, it helped Mithila gain early experience in front of the camera and introduced her to the world of acting.

The short film did not receive wide mainstream distribution, but it is often mentioned as the starting point of Mithila Palkar’s acting career. After this early project, she gradually moved into digital content and web series, eventually gaining popularity through online platforms and OTT shows.

movies.name: Katti Batti
movies.description:
Katti Batti is a Hindi romantic comedy-drama film that explores the ups and downs of a modern-day relationship. The story revolves around a young couple navigating love, misunderstandings, and personal struggles in contemporary urban life.

The film stars Imran Khan and Kangana Ranaut in the lead roles. Mithila Palkar appeared in the film in a small supporting role, which was one of her early appearances in the Hindi film industry. Although her role was brief, the film contributed to her growing experience in mainstream cinema.

Released in 2015, Katti Batti combined romance, humor, and emotional drama to depict the complexities of modern relationships.

movies.name: Muramba
movies.description:
Muramba is a Marathi romantic comedy-drama film that focuses on relationships, family bonds, and the emotional challenges faced by young couples. The story follows a young man dealing with a breakup while navigating advice and interference from his parents, which leads to several humorous and heartfelt moments.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays the role of Indu, a confident and independent young woman who becomes an important part of the story’s emotional journey. Her performance added charm and relatability to the film, helping it connect well with audiences.

Released in 2017, Muramba received positive responses for its lighthearted storytelling and realistic portrayal of modern relationships, making it one of the notable Marathi films of that year.

movies.name: Karwaan
movies.description:
Karwaan is a Hindi-language road trip comedy-drama that follows the journey of three strangers who unexpectedly travel together across South India. The story begins when a young man receives the wrong body in a coffin meant for his deceased father, which leads him on a strange and emotional road trip to resolve the situation.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays Tanya, a lively and free-spirited young woman who joins the journey and adds humor and warmth to the group dynamic. Her performance brought freshness to the film and was appreciated by audiences.

The movie stars Irrfan Khan, Dulquer Salmaan, and Mithila Palkar in the lead roles. Released in 2018, Karwaan received positive reviews for its storytelling, scenic road trip setting, and emotional depth.

movies.name: Chopsticks
movies.description:
Chopsticks is a Hindi-language comedy-drama film released on Netflix in 2019. The story follows Nirma Sahastrabuddhe, a shy and insecure young woman living in Mumbai whose life takes an unexpected turn when her car is stolen.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays the lead role of Nirma, a timid but determined woman who teams up with a mysterious con artist to recover her stolen car. Throughout the journey, she gradually gains confidence and begins to overcome her fears.

The film also stars Abhay Deol, whose character helps guide Nirma through a series of unusual situations. Chopsticks received attention for its quirky storyline, character-driven narrative, and Mithila Palkar’s relatable performance.

movies.name: A Babysitter's Guide to Monster Hunting
movies.description:
A Babysitter's Guide to Monster Hunting is a fantasy adventure film released on Netflix in 2020. The movie is based on the popular children's book series by Joe Ballarini and follows the story of a young babysitter who discovers a secret society dedicated to protecting children from monsters.

In the Hindi dubbed version of the film, Mithila Palkar provided the voice for the main character Liz Lerue, bringing her energetic and expressive style to the role. The original character in the English version was played by Tamara Smart.

The film combines adventure, fantasy, and comedy as the protagonist joins other babysitters on a mission to rescue a child kidnapped by monsters on Halloween night.

movies.name: Tribhanga
movies.description:
Tribhanga is a Hindi-language family drama film released on Netflix in 2021. The story explores the complex relationship between three generations of women, highlighting themes of family conflict, forgiveness, and emotional healing.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays the role of Masha, the daughter of a successful but complicated writer. Through her character, the film portrays the struggles and emotional dynamics between mothers and daughters across different generations.

The movie stars Kajol, Tanvi Azmi, and Mithila Palkar in key roles. Directed by Renuka Shahane, Tribhanga received positive responses for its strong performances and powerful storytelling about family relationships.

movies.name: Ori Devuda
movies.description:
Ori Devuda is a Telugu-language romantic fantasy comedy film released in 2022. The movie tells the story of a young man who regrets his marriage decision and is unexpectedly given a chance to relive parts of his life with guidance from a mysterious divine figure.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays Anu Paulraj, the supportive and caring wife of the protagonist. Her character plays an important role in the emotional development of the story and highlights themes of love, trust, and second chances in relationships.

The film stars Vishwak Sen in the lead role and also features Venkatesh Daggubati in a special appearance as a divine guide. Ori Devuda received positive responses from audiences for its unique concept and engaging storytelling.

movies.name: Sweet Dreams
movies.description:
Sweet Dreams is a Hindi-language romantic drama film released in 2025. The story explores themes of love, destiny, and emotional connections between two individuals who experience mysterious dreams that begin to influence their real lives.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays the role of Dia, a young woman whose life takes an unexpected turn when she begins to encounter unusual dreams that connect her to someone she has never met before. Her character brings emotional depth to the story as the narrative unfolds between reality and imagination.

The film also stars Amol Parashar in a lead role. Sweet Dreams blends romance with elements of mystery and emotional storytelling, offering audiences a unique cinematic experience.

movies.name: Saale Aashiq
movies.description:
Saale Aashiq is a Hindi-language romantic drama film released in 2025. The movie explores themes of love, societal pressure, and the emotional struggles faced by couples who challenge traditional norms for their relationship.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays a lead role, portraying a strong and determined young woman navigating complex emotions and societal expectations. Her character adds depth to the story as the narrative focuses on the challenges faced by lovers in modern society.

The film also stars Tahir Raj Bhasin in a prominent role. Saale Aashiq presents an emotional story about relationships, courage, and the consequences of choosing love despite obstacles.

movies.name: Oho Enthan Baby
movies.description:
Oho Enthan Baby is a Tamil-language romantic comedy film released in 2024. The movie presents a lighthearted love story filled with humor, emotional moments, and modern relationship dynamics.

In the film, Mithila Palkar plays a lead role, marking one of her appearances in Tamil cinema. Her character brings charm and freshness to the story as the narrative explores the ups and downs of love, misunderstandings, and personal growth.

The film blends romance and comedy while highlighting contemporary urban relationships, making it appealing to younger audiences. With its engaging storyline and entertaining characters, Oho Enthan Baby adds another interesting project to Mithila Palkar’s growing filmography.

movies.name: Happy Patel: Khatarnak Jasoos
movies.description:
Happy Patel: Khatarnak Jasoos is an upcoming Hindi-language comedy action film that follows the adventures of an unusual detective who becomes involved in a series of entertaining and dangerous situations while solving mysteries.

In the film, Mithila Palkar is expected to appear in an important role, although detailed information about her character has not yet been officially revealed. The movie combines elements of comedy, action, and detective-style storytelling, making it an entertaining project for audiences.

The film also features veteran actor Johnny Lever in a key role. With its humorous narrative and action-packed moments, Happy Patel: Khatarnak Jasoos aims to deliver a fun cinematic experience.

awards.title: Best Female Debut – Marathi
awards.description: Mithila Palkar won the Filmfare Marathi Award for Best Female Debut – Marathi for her performance in the Marathi film Muramba, which marked her successful entry into regional cinema.

awards.title: Best Playback Singer – Female
awards.description: Mithila Palkar received a nomination for Best Playback Singer – Female at the Zee Chitra Gaurav Puraskar, recognizing her contribution as a singer in Marathi entertainment.

awards.title: Best Actress – Comedy
awards.description: Mithila Palkar won the Best Actress – Comedy award at the IReel Awards for her role as Kavya in the popular web series Little Things.

awards.title: Best Actress in Comedy / Romance
awards.description: She won the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Actress in Comedy/Romance for her performance in the Netflix web series Little Things.

awards.title: Best Actress – Comedy Series
awards.description: Mithila Palkar won the Filmfare OTT Award for Best Actress – Comedy Series for her widely appreciated role in Little Things.

awards.title: Best Supporting Actress – Web Originals
awards.description: She was nominated for Best Supporting Actress – Web Originals at the Filmfare OTT Awards for her performance in the Netflix film Tribhanga.

awards.title: Best Actress – Comedy Series
awards.description: Mithila Palkar received a nomination for Best Actress – Comedy Series at the Filmfare OTT Awards for Little Things.

awards.title: Best Actress Critics – Comedy Series
awards.description: She won the Best Actress Critics – Comedy Series award at the Filmfare OTT Awards for her performance in Little Things.

awards.title: Best Actress in a Series
awards.description: Mithila Palkar was nominated for Best Actress in a Series at the Indian Film Festival of Melbourne for her role in Little Things.

awards.title: Most Stylish Digital Entertainer (Female)
awards.description: She received a nomination for Most Stylish Digital Entertainer (Female) at the Bollywood Hungama Style Icons Awards.

awards.title: Best Female Debut – Telugu
awards.description: Mithila Palkar was nominated for Best Female Debut – Telugu at the SIIMA Awards for her performance in the Telugu film Ori Devuda.

seo.twitterDescription: Learn about Mithila Palkar’s biography, age, movies, career, achievements and net worth. Famous for Little Things and Karwaan.

career:
Mithila Palkar began her acting journey in 2014 with a Marathi short film titled “Majha Honeymoon.” Although the project had a limited audience, it gave her early exposure to acting and helped her understand the craft of performing in front of the camera.

Her first major recognition came in 2016 when her “Cup Song” video went viral on social media. The video quickly gained millions of views and introduced Mithila to a wider audience across India. This unexpected internet fame opened doors for her in the digital entertainment industry.

Soon after, Mithila appeared in the popular web series Girl in the City, where she played the role of a young woman navigating life and career in Mumbai. However, her biggest breakthrough came with the Netflix series Little Things, where she portrayed Kavya Kulkarni. The show became extremely popular among young viewers for its relatable portrayal of modern relationships, making Mithila one of the most recognized faces in India’s web-series space.

In addition to digital projects, Mithila expanded her career into films. She made her Bollywood debut with Karwaan (2018), starring alongside Irrfan Khan and Dulquer Salmaan. Her performance in the film was appreciated for its natural and relatable style.

She later appeared in the Netflix film Tribhanga, sharing screen space with Kajol. Apart from Hindi cinema, Mithila has also worked in Marathi films, including Muramba, which further established her presence in regional cinema.

Over the years, Mithila Palkar has built a strong reputation as a versatile actress who comfortably moves between web series, films, and digital content. Her relatable acting style and strong connection with younger audiences continue to make her a popular figure in modern Indian entertainment.
earlyLife:
Mithila Palkar was born on 11 January 1993 in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. She grew up in a culturally rich Maharashtrian family where creativity and education were both encouraged. From a young age, Mithila showed a strong interest in performing arts, particularly acting and storytelling.

During her childhood, she spent much of her time with her grandparents in Mumbai, who played a significant role in shaping her personality and supporting her ambitions. Growing up in a vibrant city like Mumbai exposed her to theatre, cinema, and various cultural activities, which gradually strengthened her passion for the entertainment industry.

For her education, Mithila attended school in Mumbai and later pursued a Bachelor of Mass Media (BMM) from Smt. Mithibai College, Mumbai. While studying in college, she actively participated in theatre and creative projects, which helped her develop confidence in front of the camera.

Her early exposure to performing arts and digital content eventually paved the way for her entry into the world of acting, where she would later become widely recognized for her work in web series, films, and online entertainment.
personalLife:
Mithila Palkar is known for keeping her personal life relatively private despite being a well-known public figure. She was born and raised in Mumbai, Maharashtra, and shares a close bond with her family, especially her grandparents who played an important role in her upbringing.

Mithila has often spoken about how her grandparents supported her creative interests from a young age and encouraged her to pursue acting and performing arts. Their support helped shape her confidence and passion for storytelling.

When it comes to relationships, Mithila Palkar prefers to keep her romantic life away from the public eye. As of recent public information, she has not publicly confirmed any relationship or marriage, and she mainly focuses on her acting career and creative projects.

Outside of acting, Mithila enjoys music, traveling, reading, and spending time with friends and family. She is also quite active on social media, where she shares glimpses of her daily life, behind-the-scenes moments from shoots, and interactions with fans.

Despite her growing popularity in films and web series, Mithila is often appreciated for her grounded personality, relatable lifestyle, and positive attitude, which have helped her build a strong connection with audiences across India.
